Event: Winter Festival 2025
Event Date: 01/12/2025
Sage Bot Item Code: AR349
Drakkar Shot Gear

Once in a while, when the armor owner's health drops below 30%, they swap the current health value with the enemy unit that has the greatest current health, and turn that unit into a rock for 3 sec. The target cannot move, takes 35% more damage for the duration and receives 120000 magic damage every second. When the effect runs out, the target explodes. The explosion deals 200000 pure damage to the target, and their physical and magic armor is reduced by 15% for 3 sec. 2 nearby enemies are hit by rocks. The rocks deal 160000 physical damage on impact and stun for 2 sec. The armor's owner also goes into a frenzy. They increase in size, and all their stats are increased by 15% for 2 sec.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: 🌝🌝🌝🌚🌚

Event: Winter Festival 2025
